TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kaaluan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 129 buwan, 395 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 385 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 10 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kaaluan ga Maljivel ru Tjuluuai. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kaaluan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kaaluan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaaluan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kaaluan ɣa malji*el ru tjuluuai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kaaluan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kaaluan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kaaluan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 129 buwan, 395 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 385 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 10 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Kaaluan ga Maljivel ru Tjuluuai. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kaaluan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Kaaluan ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kaaluan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na kaaluan ɣa malji*el ru tjuluuai. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kaaluan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ kaaluan ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
